title: SEBI eases NISM certification norms for relationship managers, sales executives | Full details here
summary: Sebi has simplified the NISM certification process for sales and non-core staff in investment advisory roles, allowing them to obtain a lighter certification module based on feedback from market participants. This change aims to ease compliance for firms and will take effect immediately.

title: I asked ChatGPT: How much emergency fund a family really needs in 2026, here what the math said
summary: In 2026, a family in Noida should maintain an emergency fund of around ₹17 lakh, based on monthly expenses of ₹1.4 lakh. This amount provides a financial cushion for one year during unemployment, ensuring uninterrupted living costs.

title: Normal SIP, fixed top-up SIP, or variable top-up SIP: Which approach created more wealth over the years?
summary: The analysis shows that while a regular SIP can create significant wealth over the long term, investors who increase their SIP contributions periodically stand a much better chance of building a larger corpus.

title: Living in Bengaluru, Pune or Hyderabad? Your tax benefits just got bigger – What you need to know about new HRA rules
summary: The CBDT has revised HRA rules, expanding benefits for taxpayers in major urban areas and increasing compliance requirements. New metro cities added for HRA exemptions could lead to higher tax savings for employees in cities like Bengaluru and Hyderabad under the Old Tax Regime.

title: ‘ ₹3 Cr in savings, yet he won't run the AC,’ Retirement money mistake your parents are making—and how you can help
summary: Many retirees struggle to enjoy their wealth, often due to ingrained saving habits from an era of scarcity. They prioritize saving for children over personal comfort, leading to diminished quality of life.&nbsp;

title: Should NRIs in Dubai use a UAE foundation for succession planning?
summary: A UAE foundation can help NRI HNIs preserve and transfer family wealth efficiently through a separate legal structure, but it should be integrated with a local will and a broader estate plan.

title: Room rent cap, co-pay, deductibles - Hidden policy terms that impact hospital bill payouts
summary: Health insurance buyers often overlook important policy clauses that can impact claim payouts, such as co-payments and exclusions. Understanding these details is essential to minimize out-of-pocket expenses during hospitalization.&nbsp;

title: ITAT: Accrued interest component on non-convertible debentures sales is taxable as interest income
summary: The ITAT has held that the accrued interest component embedded in sale proceeds from non-convertible debentures cannot automatically be treated as capital gains and may instead be taxed as interest income. Tax experts say the decision could trigger greater scrutiny and fresh litigation.

title: Gold futures sink to three-month low as dollar rally batters bullion
summary: India's gold prices hit a three-month low on Wednesday, dropping to Rs 1.44 lakh per 10 grams, as global markets react to a bolstered US dollar and expectations for elevated interest rates. Analysts attribute this slump to signals from the Federal Reserve and a notable downturn in technology stocks.
